merges-complete.rubric: Judge PARALLEL-REPORT.md and git reality on staging. Every planned package not cancelled must show AC pass evidence, merge onto staging, and worktree removal. Verdict revise if merges missing, AC skipped, worktrees remain, or report celebrates manual cluster mutation.

no-manual-mutation-in-report.description: PARALLEL-REPORT must not claim set-image / apply -k as AC

plan-disjoint-sound.rubric: Judge plan.md against inputs/goal.md. Every package must be necessary for the goal or explicitly deferred; write_paths within each parallel_group must be plausibly non-interfering; deps must not create cycles; each ac_command must verify that package's outcome. Verdict revise if packages are fake splits, AC is vibes-only, pin-from-build skips deploy-key scaffold, or the plan relies on kubectl set image.

report-schema.description: PARALLEL-REPORT.md has per-package merge + AC evidence

worktrees-cleaned.description: No leftover worktrees for planned package ids

side_effects.notes: Creates git worktrees and branches under /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/homie-worktrees from staging. Merges into staging when AC passes; removes worktrees after merge. Never force-push. Push/PR optional and requires explicit approval. Before any worktree add: pkill -f 'git.*check-ignore' and rm -f .git/index.lock. If worktree add hangs >60s, stop and ask human (do not set image). Desired-state changes only via git commits on package branches.

anti_goals: Editing overlapping write_paths in the same parallel_group without a plan revise
Leaving worktrees around after a successful merge
Declaring a package done without a passing ac_command
Committing secrets or filling secrets.example with real values
kubectl set image / kubectl apply -k staging|production overlays as a fix
Creating worktrees while Cursor git check-ignore watchers hold the index lock
goal.definition_of_done: plan.md lists >=2 packages with id/deps/parallel_group/worktree/branch/ write_paths/ac_command; same-group write_paths are disjoint; PARALLEL-REPORT.md records every package merged with AC pass evidence and worktree removed; staging contains all package changes; no open worktrees remain for this loop's package ids; no TBD placeholders; no package solved desired-state via kubectl set image or apply -k of staging/production.
goal.statement: Achieve the goal in inputs/goal.md for the repository at /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/Homie by decomposing work into disjoint packages. Every package forks from root branch staging into its own git worktree under /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/homie-worktrees, has non-overlapping write_paths within its parallel_group, and a verifiable ac_command. When a package's acceptance criteria pass, merge its branch into staging and remove its worktree. Produce PARALLEL-REPORT.md listing each package id, write_paths, AC command + exit evidence, merge commit, and worktree removal confirmation. Honor .cursor/rules/no-manual-cluster-mutation.mdc throughout.

verification.description: PARALLEL-REPORT.md has per-package merge + AC evidence
No leftover worktrees for planned package ids
PARALLEL-REPORT must not claim set-image / apply -k as AC

verification.rubric: Judge plan.md against inputs/goal.md. Every package must be necessary for the goal or explicitly deferred; write_paths within each parallel_group must be plausibly non-interfering; deps must not create cycles; each ac_command must verify that package's outcome. Verdict revise if packages are fake splits, AC is vibes-only, pin-from-build skips deploy-key scaffold, or the plan relies on kubectl set image.

Judge PARALLEL-REPORT.md and git reality on staging. Every planned package not cancelled must show AC pass evidence, merge onto staging, and worktree removal. Verdict revise if merges missing, AC skipped, worktrees remain, or report celebrates manual cluster mutation.

human_checkpoints: After plan_gate: confirm package write_paths + deploy-key approach for pin-from-build before worktrees
Before first worktree: pkill git check-ignore watchers; abort if worktree add hangs (macos-git-slowness)

signals: worktree add fails repeatedly without changing approach
PARALLEL-REPORT.md has no material change after revise
kubectl set image proposed as package solution

meta.author: looper-homie
meta.description: Close Homie GitOps CD gaps (assert-pin, trigger-scrape, pin-from-build, migrate PreSync, docs) via disjoint worktree packages off staging with verifiable ACs — no kubectl set image / overlay bypass.
meta.name: homie-gitops-cd
